name: Rick and Morty API
description: Free REST and GraphQL API providing data about characters, locations, and episodes from the Rick and Morty animated series. No authentication required. Offers access to 826 characters, 126 locations, and 51 episodes with filtering, pagination, and character images.

offers.description: Free public API with optional support tier. No authentication required.

availableChannel.name: REST API
availableChannel.description: RESTful API returning paginated JSON responses with up to 20 results per page.

availableChannel.name: GraphQL API
availableChannel.description: GraphQL endpoint for flexible querying of characters, locations, and episodes.

featureList: 826 characters with images, status, species, and episode appearances
126 locations with type, dimension, and resident references
51 episodes with air dates and character listings
Pagination with up to 20 results per page
Filtering by name, status, species, type, gender
Multiple ID lookup in single request

item.name: Get All Characters
item.description: Returns paginated list of all 826 characters. Supports filtering by name, status, species, type, gender.

item.name: Get Character by ID
item.description: Returns a single character by integer ID. Supports multiple IDs as array.

item.name: Get All Locations
item.description: Returns paginated list of all 126 locations. Supports filtering by name, type, dimension.

item.name: Get Location by ID
item.description: Returns a single location by integer ID. Supports multiple IDs as array.

item.name: Get All Episodes
item.description: Returns paginated list of all 51 episodes. Supports filtering by name and episode code.

item.name: Get Episode by ID
item.description: Returns a single episode by integer ID. Supports multiple IDs as array.
